description: APT41 DUST - Sophisticated multi-stage operation with dual espionage and financial motivation

techniques.name: Search Engines
techniques.description: APT41 DUST used search engines to research victim servers

techniques.name: Search Victim-Owned Websites
techniques.description: APT41 DUST accessed external victim websites for target development

techniques.name: Scan Databases
techniques.description: APT41 DUST used internet scan data for target development

techniques.name: Serverless
techniques.description: APT41 DUST used infrastructure behind Cloudflare or Cloudflare Workers for C2

techniques.name: Compromise Accounts: Cloud Accounts
techniques.description: APT41 DUST used compromised Google Workspace accounts for C2

techniques.name: Code Signing Certificates
techniques.description: APT41 DUST used stolen code signing certificates to sign DUSTTRAP malware

techniques.name: Web Shell
techniques.description: APT41 DUST used web shells such as ANTSWORD and BLUEBEAM for persistence

techniques.name: Windows Service
techniques.description: APT41 DUST used Windows Services named 'Windows Defend' for DUSTPAN persistence

techniques.name: DLL Search Order Hijacking
techniques.description: APT41 DUST used DLL search order hijacking and side-loading for DUSTTRAP

techniques.name: Service Execution
techniques.description: APT41 DUST used Windows services to execute DUSTPAN

techniques.name: Encrypted/Encoded File
techniques.description: APT41 DUST used encrypted payloads decrypted and executed in memory

techniques.name: Masquerade Task or Service
techniques.description: APT41 DUST disguised DUSTPAN as legitimate Windows binaries like w3wp.exe

techniques.name: Code Signing
techniques.description: APT41 DUST used stolen code signing certificates for DUSTTRAP and payloads

techniques.name: File Deletion
techniques.description: APT41 DUST deleted various artifacts from victim systems following use

techniques.name: Databases
techniques.description: APT41 DUST collected data from victim Oracle databases using SQLULDR2

techniques.name: Automated Collection
techniques.description: APT41 DUST used SQLULDR2 and PINEGROVE to gather system and database data

techniques.name: Local Data Staging
techniques.description: APT41 DUST exported Oracle database data to local CSV files before exfiltration

techniques.name: Archive via Utility
techniques.description: APT41 DUST used rar to compress data from internal Oracle databases

techniques.name: Web Service
techniques.description: APT41 DUST used compromised Google Workspace accounts for C2

techniques.name: Web Protocols
techniques.description: APT41 DUST used HTTPS for command and control

techniques.name: Asymmetric Cryptography
techniques.description: APT41 DUST used HTTPS with asymmetric cryptography for C2

techniques.name: Ingress Tool Transfer
techniques.description: APT41 DUST used certutil.exe via web shell to download the DUSTPAN dropper

techniques.name: Exfiltration to Cloud Storage
techniques.description: APT41 DUST exfiltrated collected information to OneDrive
